mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO NMCP_RWD_FAIL_HIST ( HIST_SEQ,
REQUEST_KEY,
RES_NO, CONTRACT_NUM, SYS_DATE, USER_ID, FAIL_RSN, ACCESS_URL, ACCESS_IP ) VALUES ( SQ_RWD_FAIL_HIST.NEXTVAL,
#{requestKey},
#{resNo}, #{contractNum}, SYSDATE, #{userId}, #{failRsn}, #{accessUrl}, #{accessIp} )
mapper.update: UPDATE EMV_SCAN_MST SET WORK_ID = 'S0012', DOC_TITLE = CUST_NM || '_자급제보상서비스신청' WHERE 1 = 1 AND SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
UPDATE EMV_SCAN_FILE SET DOC_ID = 'E0022' WHERE 1 = 1 AND SCAN_ID = #{scanId}
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID AS SCAN_FILE_ID, SCAN_ID FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId} ORDER BY FILE_NUMBER
mapper.update: INSERT INTO EMV_SCAN_FILE (FILE_ID, SCAN_ID, FILE_NUMBER, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, DOC_ID, MAIN_DOC_CD, USE_YN, ORIGIN_DIR, RGST_DT, RGST_PRSN_ID ) SELECT FILE_ID, #{orgScanId} AS SCAN_ID, #{maxFileNum} AS FILE_NUMBER, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, DOC_ID, MAIN_DOC_CD, 'Y', ORIGIN_DIR, RGST_DT, #{regstId} FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId} AND FILE_ID = #{scanFileId}
